data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of booking cancellation if the checklist is not complete. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the requirement but does not provide concrete evidence of how this is enforced, indicating a clear gap in the implementation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or state checks confirming booking cancellation if checklist not complete.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the booking cancellation requirement.
